summary: Treat Google Flights wrb.fr envelopes with compact status metadata `[13]` as blocked RPC responses so the existing server-rendered HTML fallback runs.
reason: Google now sometimes omits the verbose `travel.frontend.flights.ErrorResponse` type URL and returns only the code-13 metadata slot while keeping the result payload null. The old detector classified that as unrecognized drift, so fare searches failed before reaching the fallback path that still returns itineraries.
validated_outcome: `go test -run TestParseOffersResponseDetectsCompactBlockedEnvelope -v ./internal/gflights/...` passes; live `go run ./cmd/flight-goat-pp-cli flights SEA NRT 2026-12-18 --return 2027-01-01 --passengers 4 --agent` returns 9 itineraries via the HTML fallback.
